channel.title: Reverb — New Bass Guitars
channel.description: Recently listed bass guitars on Reverb

item.title: 2025 Spector USA Custom Shop NS-5 - Blue Inferno — $8,121
item.description:
$8,121 · Brand New · 12th Fret Music

Spector USA Custom Shop NS-5 5-String Bass - Blue Inferno

Solid Body Active 5-String Electric Bass, Double-Cut Style Maple Body with Burl Top, Pau Ferro Fretboard, EMG Active Pickups

Model Information

Model: NS-5 (5-String Neck-Thru)

Scale Length: 35"

String Spacing (5-String): Standard - 0.66"

Body

Construction: Top & Back Option

Bookmatched Top Woods: Maple Burl

Back Woods: Plain Maple

Customer Selected Top Wood: No

Weight Relief: Solid / No Weight Relief

Neck

Neck Wood: 3-Piece Maple

Neck Profile: Standard NS Shape

Fingerboard

Fingerboard Wood: Pau Ferro

Fingerboard Type: Fretted

Inlays: Crowns in reconstituted stone version of BMOP from Masecraft

Side Dots: Blue Luminlay

Headstock

Headstock Options: Matching Wooden Headstock Overlay

Headstock Logo Material: Custom – Stone BMOP (like inlays)

Finish

Finish: High Gloss

Stain: Multi Stage (Two or More Colors; Color Sanded Back w/ Blue Inferno)

Electronics

Pickup (5-String): EMG - 40DCX Set

Pickup Spacing: Standard

Electronics: Spector HAZ 18v

Hardware

Bridge Material: Brass

Tuners: Hipshot UltraLite Tuners

Hardware Color: Gold

Strap Buttons: Dunlop Straplocks

Additional Options

Include Staff Signature: Yes

Case: Hardshell Case

(Includes Original "Spector" Hardshell Case)

item.title: Ibanez SR5006-OL Prestige Soundgear 6-String Electric Bass Guitar - Oil Finish — $2,970
item.description:
$2,970 · Brand New · The 1979 Shop

Ibanez SR5006E OL Prestige - Oil. Becoming difficult to find brand new such as this fine example.

  • Made in Japan
  • Finish: Oil, with Gold hardware.
  • Body: Wenge top/Wenge back/African Mahogany body
  • Neck: Atlas-6 HP5pc Wenge/Walnut neck, with KTS Titanium Reinforcement. Bolt-on neck construction
  • Scale: 34"
  • Fretboard: Wenge fretboardMother of Pearl & Abalone oval inlay
  • Fretboard Radius: 500mmR
  • Frets: 24, Medium frets, Prestige fret edge treatment
  • Nut: 54mm Graph Tech BLACK TUSQ XL nut
  • Headstock: Ibanez SR-style.
  • Hardware: Gold
  • Tuners: Orig. Ibanez.
  • Bridge: Orig. Ibanez MR-5S bridge
  • Pickups: 2x USA Bartolini Custom Humbuckers with PWC III 3 band EQ.
  • Electronics: 1x volume, 1x balance, EQ on/off switch, 1x bass boost/cut, 1x mid boost/cut, 1x mid Q, 1x treble boost/cut.
  • The bass comes with an orig. Ibanez Hardcase & with factory accessories.

item.title: Fender PB-62 Precision Bass '62 Reissue 1993 Black Japan Fujigen MIJ w/ Gig Bag — $1,395
item.description:
$1,395 · Very Good · A Flash Flood of Gear

This Fender PB-62 Precision Bass Reissue was made in the Fujigen Factory in Japan between 1993-1994. This bass feels comfortable to play and sounds great! The tone woods include a basswood body, "C" shape maple neck, and rosewood fretboard. 

This bass is in nice shape for its age at over 30 years old! It does show some cosmetic wear from over the years that includes various surface scratches, scuffs, chips, and dents throughout the body with additional dings along the back of the neck and headstock. The hardware and pickups also show normal tarnishing from over the years. The frets exhibit only light play wear with plenty of life left. All of the electronics work as they should. 

This bass comes freshly set up with D'addario EXL170 (45-100) Bass Roundwound strings. The electronics were serviced, with new volume/tone pots and a new tone capacitor, this bass is otherwise all original. 

Pickup Readings:
9.8k ohms

Includes the pictured gig bag.

Make: Fender
Model: PB-62 Precision Bass Reissue MIJ
Year: 1993-1994
Fretboard Material: Rosewood
Fretboard Radius: 7.25"
Scale length: 34"
Weight: 8.75 pounds
Nut Width: 1.67"
Neck Width at 12th fret: 2.25"
Neck Thickness at 1st fret: 0.8"
Neck Thickness at 12th fret: 0.96"
Case/bag: Includes the pictured gig bag
Made in Japan

We have shipped hundreds of instruments and other music related items and can assure you that your new gear will be packed professionally with the utmost care, using high quality materials.

Please see pictures for exact condition and details.

If you have any questions please let us know. Thanks for looking!

item.title: Squier Mini Precision Bass Guitar, 2-Color Sunburst — $209.99
item.description:
$209.99 · Brand New · Russo Music

Squier Mini Precision Bass Guitar, 2-Color Sunburst

The Squier Mini Precision Bass® is the perfect companion for players seeking a reduced-size instrument with classic styling and familiar Fender® tone. Highlights include a thin and lightweight body, a short-scale neck with an easy-to-play "C"-shaped profile, a Squier split single-coil pickup with volume and tone controls for sonic variety, and a hardtail bridge for solid tuning stability.

item.title: USA Peavey Cirrus 6 String Bass Guitar — $1,999
item.description:
$1,999 · Very Good · BAMonBASS Gear Emporium

USA Peavey Cirrus with original pickups, preamp and hardshell case. Low action and plays great.

item.title: Ibanez Ashula SRAS7-DEB Bass Workshop Hybrid Fretless Fretted Soundgear Electric Bass Guitar - Dragon Eye Burst — $970
item.description:
$970 · Excellent · The 1979 Shop

Ibanez Ashula SRAS7 7-String Bass with hybrid fretless/fretted fretboard. Excellent Condition. Shipped with Bag or Case. 10 LBS Approx. Weight.

item.title: Sterling By Music Man StingRay RAY5LH Bass Guitar Left-handed - Vintage Sunburst — $499.99
item.description:
$499.99 · Brand New · Big Apple Music

The left-handed 5-string StingRay RAY5 bass features a 9v active preamp, a low noise humbucking pickup, and a fully adjustable heavy duty bridge.

Model ST-RAY5LH-VSBS-M1 Body Wood Basswood Body Color Vintage Sunburst Satin Bridge Fixed Bridge Pickguard Black Scale Length 34" (86.4cm) Neck Radius 12" (30.5cm) Frets 22 Frets, Medium Neck Width 1.77" (45mm) at Nut, 2.72" (69mm) at Last Fret Neck Wood Hard Maple Fingerboard Hard Maple Fret Markers Black Dot Markers Tuners Open Gear Truss Rod Single Action Neck Attachment 6 Bolt Pattern Controls 2-band Active Preamp Switching N/A Pickups H - 1 Ceramic Humbucker Strings .045-.125

item.title: Warwick - Standard Corvette 5 String Electric Bass Guitar - Natural - USED — $1,099.99
item.description:
$1,099.99 · Very Good · Manchester Music Mill

Warwick - Standard Corvette 5 String Electric Bass Guitar - Natural - USED

item.title: 1970's Yamaha SA-70 Modified - Sunburst — $1,850
item.description:
$1,850 · Very Good · Milwaukee Vintage

Serial #: 28946

Weight: 7lb, 4.1oz

This Yamaha SA-70 features a hollow maple body with baffles in the F-holes. It is equipped with an unoriginal mudbucker at the neck and the original mini humbucker at the bridge with Master Volume, Tone, and Blend controls. There is extra routing in the top for the mudbucker and the pickguard and bridge cover are missing. It plays great with low action and the frets are in excellent shape with no wear. The overall condition is very good with light scratches. It comes with an unoriginal gig bag in excellent condition.

In the Milwaukee Area? Stop in our shop to inspect/demo.

Buy with confidence: See our feedback and thank you for considering. All the gear we sell is packaged with great care for safe arrival in the condition advertised and backed up by our 14 day full refund policy in the event you are not happy for any reason.

Local Pickup at our shop in Milwaukee, WI

Milwaukee Vintage
10220 W. Greenfield Ave
Milwaukee, WI
Open Tues-Friday 11-6
Saturday 11-3

item.title: IYV IBSY-700 Natural Finish 7-String Bass - BEAUTIFUL WOOD — $299.95
item.description:
$299.95 · Mint · WIZARD ENGINEERING

This is a NEW, open-box bass.

The shipping carton has been opened to:

  • Take PHOTOS - the guitar you SEE in this listing photos is the actual guitar you will RECEIVE.
  • INSPECT for shipping damage, manufacturing defects, finish flaws. Any problems will be disclosed in the listing.
  • Perform a SET-UP on the guitar so that the instrument that arrives on your doorstep will be VERY PLAYABLE right out of the carton. This set-up includes nut height, truss rod, action, intonation, pickup height, and filing sharp fret ends. We strive to provide a medium-low action that will suit most musicians playing styles.

item.title: Fender Player II Precision Bass Guitar, Maple Fingerboard, Rallye Orange — $849.99
item.description:
$849.99 · Brand New · Russo Music

Fender Player II Precision Bass Guitar, Maple Fingerboard, Rallye Orange

Step into the spotlight and experience iconic Fender® sound and style with the Player II Precision Bass® — a stage-ready bass guitar with contemporary updates to power your performance and inspire your playing.

The Player II Precision Bass radiates timeless Fender charm, but under the hood, it's primed for today's players. Everything about the neck is designed for fast and fluid playability, from the Modern “C”-profile with silky satin urethane finish on the back to the comfy 9.5”-radius slab rosewood or maple fingerboard with smooth rolled edges and 20 medium jumbo frets. A classic alder body is available in both timeless Fender finishes and never-before-seen colors unearthed from the archives. Player Series Alnico V Split-Coil P bass® pickups offer sweet highs, musical mids and seismic lows that elevate any genre. An adjustable 4-saddle bridge, single-groove steel saddles and open-gear tuners ensure precise tuning stability for the flexibility to explore endless sonic possibilities.

Perfect for crafting your own sound, the Player II Precision Bass has the looks, tone and feel that only a Fender delivers.

item.title: SQUIER MINI PRECISION BASS - TWO TONE SUNBURST — $220.16
item.description:
$220.16 · Brand New · Stang Guitars Inc.

The Squier Mini Precision Bass® is the perfect companion for players seeking a reduced-size instrument with classic styling and familiar Fender® tone. Highlights include a thin and lightweight body, a short-scale neck with an easy-to-play "C"-shaped profile, a Squier split single-coil pickup with volume and tone controls for sonic variety, and a hardtail bridge for solid tuning stability.
Features

  • 100% Designed by Fender

  • Thin and lightweight body

  • Short-scale neck

  • Split single-coil Precision Bass pickup

  • Sealed die-cast tuning machines

item.title: SQUIER CLASSIC VIBE TELECASTER BASS - MOCHA — $603.77
item.description:
$603.77 · Brand New · Stang Guitars Inc.

Sharing several styling cues with the Telecaster® models of the late 1960s and early ’70s, the Classic Vibe™ Telecaster® Bass is a riff on the elusive humbucker-equipped beast that prowled through the groovy decade. Equipped with a Fender Designed™ alnico Wide Range humbucking bass pickup in the neck position, this bass produces thunderous tone well-suited for an endless variety of styles. This throwback Squier model also features a contoured body for superior playing comfort, period-inspired headstock markings, rich-looking nickel-plated hardware and a slick vintage-tinted gloss neck finish for an old-school vibe.

  • Fender Designed alnico Wide Range humbucking pickup

  • Telecaster-inspired headstock and pickguard shape

  • 4-saddle bridge with slotted barrel saddles

  • Vintage-tinted gloss neck finish

  • Nickel-plated hardware


Features

  • Fender Designed alnico Wide Range humbucking pickup

  • Telecaster-inspired headstock and pickguard shape

  • 4-saddle bridge with slotted barrel saddles

  • Vintage-tinted gloss neck finish

  • Nickel-plated hardware

item.title: SQUIER SONIC BRONCO BASS - DAPHNE BLUE — $271.70
item.description:
$271.70 · Brand New · Stang Guitars Inc.

The Squier Sonic® Bronco® Bass is ready to launch any musical adventure into warp speed, offering iconic Fender® style and inspiring tone for players at any stage. This Bronco Bass sports a slim and inviting "C"-shaped neck profile with a narrow 1.5" nut width and a thin, lightweight body for optimal playing comfort while a Squier® single-coil pickup delivers punchy bass tone. Further details of this model include a short 30" scale length, 4-saddle hardtail bridge for precise intonation adjustment, sealed-gear tuning machines for smooth, accurate tuning and durable chrome-plated hardware that is sure to catch the spotlight.Features

  • Short 30" scale length

  • Squier single-coil pickup

  • 4-saddle hardtail bridge

  • Sealed-gear tuning machines

  • Chrome hardware

item.title: C-Stock Jackson X Series Spectra Bass SBXQ IV - Amber Blue Burst w/Laurel FB — $439.99
item.description:
$439.99 · B-Stock · ProAudioStar

This unit was returned with damage to the controls compartment. It is now fully functional despite cosmetic damage.

With modern style, flexible tone and incomparable value, the Jackson X Series Spectra Bass SBXQ IV takes the adventurous player on a bold bass odyssey, launching a commanding all-new entry in Jackson’s formidable neck-through-body bass lineup.The offset Spectra Bass body style was innovatively designed with the gigging musician in mind. Its poplar body with rippling quilt maple top has a larger upper horn that evenly distributes weight throughout the instrument for perfect balance and playing comfort. The graphite-reinforced through-body maple neck with scarf joint creates formidable sustain, with a speed neck contour, 12"-16" compound radius bound laurel fingerboard and 24 frets for superior playability.

The SBXQ IV provides a full-sonic spectrum for even the most versatile and progressive bassists. Dual passive medium-output humbucking pickups create a dynamic foundation with punch, power and note articulation. Wide-ranging tonal command comes from a two-way toggle switch for pickup coil splitting, 3-band active EQ, blend control and volume control with push/pull selector to bypass or engage active circuit for the 3-band EQ. The push/pull selector eliminates the risk of losing sound due to a dead battery. A quick pull on the volume knob bypasses the active circuit, making it easy to regain sound from the bass without the use of battery power.This four-string bass also features a HiMass hardtail bridge that enhances sustain and improves attack.Budget friendly and loaded with value, the X Series Spectra Bass SBXQ IV comes in standout Amber Blue Burst with a unique 2x2 color matched headstock with understated “J” logo and black hardware.

Features

  • Body : Poplar
  • Body Finish : Gloss
  • Body Shape : Spectra
  • Neck Material : Maple
  • Neck Finish : Gloss Color Matched
  • Scale Length : 34" (86.36 cm)
  • Fingerboard : Laurel
  • Fingerboard Radius : 12"-16" Compound Radius (304.8 mm to 406.4 mm)
  • Number of Frets : 24
  • Frets Size : Jumbo
  • String Nut : Black Plastic
  • Nut Width : 1.5" (38.1 mm)
  • Position Inlays : White Dot
  • Truss Rod Wrench : Yes
  • Bridge Pickup : Jackson Medium-Output Humbucking
  • Neck Pickup : Jackson Medium-Output Humbucking
  • Controls : Volume (Push/Pull Selector for Active/Passive Options), Blend, 3-Band EQ (Active Only)
  • Pickup Switching : 2-Way Toggle Switch (Pickup Coil Split)
  • Pickup Configuration : HH
  • Bridge : Jackson HiMass
  • Hardware Finish : Black
  • Tuning Machines : Jackson Sealed Die-Cast
  • Pickguard : None
  • Control Knobs : Dome-Style
  • Strings : Nickel Plated Steel (.045-.105 Gauges)
  • Dimensions : 4.50x21.30x52.00 IN

item.title: Rickenbacker 4003 1981 - Fireglo — $3,599
item.description:
$3,599 · Good · Austin Vintage Guitars

1981 Rickenbacker 4003 w/ Original Hardshell Case

Beautiful Fireglo Finish has aged nicely but is in overall very good condition

Bass shows some fret-wear and some play wear, very nice playability, comfortable neck, setup with roundwounds

Pickups sound warm and punchy, electronics function without issue

Weighs 9lbs 7oz

item.title: Ibanez TRB-50 Bass w/ Leo Quan Badass Bridge — $329.98
item.description:
$329.98 · Good · Mountain Music

Bass is in good condition. Setup with new strings by professional guitar tech. After market Leo Quan Badass Bridge.

item.title: Warwick German Corvette Ash 4 2005 - Natural Transparent — $956.16
item.description:
$956.16 · Fair · Audiogear

2005 German Warwick Corvette Standard for Sale.
4 String, right handed.

This bass has served me very well over the years, but I don't play it as much any more so I have decided to let it go.

This is an actual German made model, not one from the cheaper Rockbass series.

Before putting it up for sale, I got it professionally set up, and and unfortunately the truss rod is very close to its limit, and further adjustments may not be possible, hence the low price.

However, it is set up very well and looks, plays and sound great.

There is a very slight surface level mark on the neck. I tried to take a picture, but it is hard to make out.

Controls are :
Volume (with push/pull passive/active)
Pickup blend
Bass & Treble (stacked pots)

Corvette Standard, 4-string
Natural Oil finish
Swamp Ash body
Ovangkol neck
Chrome hardware


Ships in a hard case.

Buyers outside of EU are responsible for all import charges etc.

item.title: Sire Marcus Miller V10 2020 - Tobacco Sunburst — $900
item.description:
$900 · Excellent · Dave Millzz Collection

Excellent 5 star condition. ..Sire bass with Marcus Miller soft travel case original box...

item.title: Tobias Toby Pro 4 — $749
item.description:
$749 · Very Good · Oxen Gear Outlet

Upgraded 2003 Tobias Toby Pro 4 (Neck-Through)

2003 Tobias Toby Pro 4 neck-through bass in transparent red gloss finish.

Upgrades Included:

  • Pickups: Upgraded to EMG 40DC/40CS David Ellefson Signature Set Active Pickups ($240 value).
  • Preamp: Upgraded to an EMG 18-Volt Preamp System ($130 value). Running at 18v gives this bass massive amounts of clean headroom, a wider dynamic range, and an ultra-clean signal chain perfect for handling heavy distortion or compression down the line.
  • Bridge: Upgraded to a heavy-duty Hipshot KickAss Bass Bridge ($90 value). This drastically improves overall sustain, note definition, and allows for fully adjustable string spacing to perfectly dial in your setup.

item.title: Takamine GB72CE NAT G Series Jumbo Cutaway Acoustic/Electric Bass 2010s - Natural Gloss with Flame Maple Back and Sides w/Case — $749
item.description:
$749 · Excellent · Spacetone Music

Takamine GB72CE-NAT G-Series Acoustic Electric Bass with Takamine hardshell case is in excellent condition with light use. Only used in a home environment. Bass plays well and sounds good. Please see photos for condition. Sorry local pick up only on this one, no exceptions. Being sold as is described and is non-returnable/refundable. Please ask all questions before hitting the buy button. Payment due within 24 hours. Check out our other listings for more great gear!

item.title: Moon PB Classic 2026 - Burgundy mist — $2,716.35
item.description:
$2,716.35 · Brand New · Bass Freaks

In stock now : Moon PB-4C - Burgundy Mist. Buyer out of EU responsible for all import cost.

Moon PB-4C - Burgundy Mist - Specs :

Woods & Construction

Additional Equipment

item.title: Spector Legend 5 Standard MIK - Black Cherry — $399.99
item.description:
$399.99 · Good · Victor Litz Music Center

Up for sale is a used Spector Legend 5 Standard (Made in Korea) in the beautiful Black Cherry finish. This bass plays well and all of the electronics are fully functional.

Condition:

  • Missing the rear electronics/control cavity cover. This is cosmetic only—the electronics work exactly as they should.
  • There was a crack on the back of the neck near the headstock that has been professionally repaired. The repair is solid and stable.
  • The bass has the typical signs of use, including dings, dents, scuffs, and scratches from normal playing and handling. Please review the photos carefully for the overall condition.

This is a great opportunity to pick up a solid-playing Spector at a great price, especially if you don't mind some cosmetic wear.

If you're interested, send us an offer! We're happy to consider reasonable offers.

CT

item.title: Seville Post Lawsuit Era SL102B Lefty Precision Bass Copy MIJ 1970s - 1980s - Black — $399
item.description:
$399 · Excellent · MSMCbo

Seville Left Handed Precision Bass Copy

The Internet gods tell me that these were made in the late 70s and early 80s, mainly in Japan

This one has the bridge with the hefty brass saddles that other MIJ models have so that backs up the claim of it being Japanese

Very well made and in great condition

item.title: Fender Precision Bass 1972 - Sherwood Green Refin — $3,699
item.description:
$3,699 · Very Good · Austin Vintage Guitars

1972 Fender Precision Bass w/ Hardshell Case

Refinished Body, super cool Aged Sherwood Green Nitro Lacquer with some very nice checking

Newer Pickguard and Thumb-rest

Original Electronics, Pickups sound fantastic

Fresh setup with flatwounds, very nice action and comfortable neck profile

Lightweight 8lbs 9oz with covers on

item.title: Ibanez GSRM20 miKro Short-Scale Bass Guitar, Metallic Purple — $219.99
item.description:
$219.99 · Brand New · Total Entertainment Music Store/Musicauthority

We are an authorized Ibanez dealer

Total Entertainment

501 West International Speedway Blvd

Daytona Beach FL 32114


Ibanez GSRM20 miKro Short-Scale Bass Guitar, Metallic Purple

The compact GSRM20 miKro bass guitar is designed for maximum comfort, with a lightweight poplar body and slim maple neck that make playing a breeze. Its short 28.6" scale is long enough to produce full, punchy bass tones, yet short enough for players with smaller hands or in cramped practice spaces.

Dynamix Pickups Deliver Versatile Tone

The GSRM20 miKro features a Dynamix P pickup at the neck and Dynamix J pickup at the bridge, providing a range of classic bass tones from full and warm to sharp and defined. Roll off the P pickup for a round, thumpy tone that lays down a solid foundation. Engage the J pickup alone for a more articulate, mid-focused sound that cuts through the mix. Blend the pickups together to find your perfect balance of lows, mids and highs.

Fast, Comfortable Neck

The GSRM20 miKro's slim maple neck offers amazing playability for bassists of all skill levels. Its fast profile allows for effortless slides and position shifts, while its short scale makes it easy to fret notes and play complex lines. The neck's satin finish minimizes friction as your hand glides up and down. Combined with its lightweight body, the GSRM20 miKro provides hours of comfortable playing without fatigue.

High-Quality Components for Great Sound

Like Ibanez's full-size basses, the GSRM20 miKro is built with high-quality components to deliver great tone and sustain. Its B10 bridge provides a solid anchor for the strings, maximizing vibration transfer to the body. Accurate fretwork and nut files ensure notes ring out clearly with no buzzing. While compact in size, the GSRM20 miKro sacrifices none of the quality that has made Ibanez a leader in bass design.

item.title: 2020 Squier Affinity Jazz Bass - Sunburst - Excellent!!! — $220
item.description:
$220 · Excellent · eBay Refugee

As you can see, this clean 2020 Squier Jazz is in excellent condition. Has a couple of small marks around the control plate but nothing through the finish. All controls function perfectly. It’s a nice instrument ready to play and provide years of enjoyment.

Could probably use new strings I presume the buyer would prefer to install their favorite gauge and brand. If you’re not comfortable with this, I’m happy to set it up with fresh strings for a small fee.


Thanks for looking and please let me know if you have any questions. It will be packaged carefully and shipped promptly.

item.title: Mosrite Custom ’65 Bass 2000s Serial No. 0030 - Fiesta Red — $3,500
item.description:
$3,500 · Excellent · DDD Custom Shop

This is a 30-year-old Mosrite Custom ’65 bass in Fiesta Red. Great condition and all accessories are included.

It is a rare specimen with the serial number 0030 (early-numbered) engraved on the fingerboard, and is a high-quality Japanese reissue made by Kurokumo.

• Overall, it is in excellent condition. The body has a beautiful luster, with almost no major scratches or dents (though there are very slight signs of use).

• The neck is straight, the frets are in good condition, and the action has been adjusted for comfortable playability.

• All electronic components and pots have been tested and confirmed to be in working order.

Accessories (Complete set of original accessories)

• Genuine hard case (featuring the Mosrite logo, with orange interior lining)

• Warranty card (including warranty terms)

• Genuine Mosrite strap (unused)

• Mosrite pick (unused)

• Tiger Sound coiled cable (unopened)

• Cleaning cloth (unused)

• Other small items inside the case

It features the classic look characteristic of a Ventures model and a unique sound that is loose yet percussive.

This is the perfect instrument for those seeking surf, rock, and vintage sounds.

Specifications

• Model: Custom ’65 Bass

• Color: Fiesta Red

• Manufacturer: Kurokumo Seisakusho (Japan)

• Serial Number: 0030 (fretboard)

• Scale: Short scale

item.title: Rickenbacker Boutique 3030 Short Scale Bass Jetglo (2026) — $2,550
item.description:
$2,550 · Excellent · Tony's Shop (Oregon)

2026 Rickenbacker 3030 Short-Scale Bass.

item.title: Ibanez EHB1505MS-BIF Ergonomic Headless 5-String Bass 2022 - Present - Black Ice Flat — $1,300
item.description:
$1,300 · Mint · Holy Mountain Gear Bazaar

This bass is practically new. I bought it a few months ago for the studio and have barely used it. This bass plays & sounds great! It's just underused and it needs to go to a good home.

item.title: Kramer DMZ4001 1979 - Natural — $1,625.46
item.description:
$1,625.46 · Good · Groove'N'Gear

A beautiful 1979 Kramer DMZ 4001, made in the USA, featuring its iconic maple/aluminum neck and distinctive headstock that stands out from the crowd.

A vintage bass full of character. It comes factory-equipped with a DiMarzio Precision Bass-style pickup and features a series/parallel switch for quick and effective tone shaping.

The sound is exceptionally big, powerful, and gritty—a real mix-cutting machine.

It weighs approximately 4.5 kg (9.9 lbs). While it's on the heavier side, its compact body makes it surprisingly comfortable to play, even during longer sets.

It shows the usual dings, scratches, and signs of use expected from a vintage instrument, but overall it remains in good condition. It has been professionally set up and is fitted with a fresh set of strings.

The bass comes with its original vintage flight case. The case has seen plenty of use over the years, but it still provides solid protection, especially for shipping.

item.title: Yamaha Nathan East Signature 5, White / Ebony *In Stock* — $4,099
item.description:
$4,099 · Brand New · BASS CENTRAL

About this listing About this listing

Yamaha Nathan East Signature Model

  • White Gloss Finish
  • Alder Body With Maple Top
  • Maple And Mahogany Neck / Thru Body
  • Ebony Fingerboard
  • Gold Hardware
  • NE-1 Active Parametric EQ
  • Case Included

S/N IMK060E

10.1 LBS

item.title: Fender Custom Shop 1963 Precision Bass Heavy Relic 2022 - Aztec gold — $4,302.70
item.description:
$4,302.70 · Excellent · David's Gear Garage

Up for sale is an exceptional Custom Shop P-bass – a Fender Custom Shop '63 Precision Bass Heavy Relic, built in September 2022 (Serial No. R121051). It is highly resonant, perfectly balanced, and currently set up with a set of broken-in Thomastik-Infeld flatwounds.

The bass is in excellent condition and plays beautifully.

Specifications:

  • Model: Fender Custom Shop '63 Precision Bass Heavy Relic
  • Year of Production: 2022
  • Body: 2-piece select Alder (Sorted for weight and quality)
  • Weight: 3.8 kg
  • Color: Aztec Gold (Nitrocellulose finish)
  • Neck: Quarter Sawn Maple with a comfortable, full 60 P-Bass Oval "C" profile (.790" - .990") The finish on the back is stripped down for a smooth, played-in feel.
  • Fingerboard: AAA Dark Rosewood with a rare Round-Laminated execution, 7.25" radius, 20 vintage upgrade frets, micarta white dot inlays.
  • Nut Width: Full-fat classic 1.750" / 44.4 mm (Bone nut).
  • Pickups: Handwound 59-62 P-Bass Relic with shield
  • Electronics: Passive, standard Volume and Tone controls.
  • Hardware: Vintage-style Relic hardware.
  • Pickguard: 4-ply Tortoise Relic.
  • The bass comes with its original Fender Custom Shop Tweed hardshell case, Certificate of Authenticity, chrome covers etc - full case candy.

item.title: Fender Player Jazz Bass - Black — $590.99
item.description:
$590.99 · Excellent · EGA Guitars

🎸 USED – Excellent Condition | Minor Back Scratch – Full Playability
Minor back scratch from shipping — purely cosmetic, does not affect playability, and adds a bit of character. Lowest price online – get it before it’s gone!

🚀 Now Offering 2-Day Shipping – Select at Checkout
✨ Every Guitar/Bass Includes a Fresh Set of Strings & a Basic Setup – Read Our Reviews! 

🏆 Hassle-Free Returns

  • New Items: 30 days from delivery
  • Used & Vintage: 7 days from delivery
    Return in original condition for a refund (less shipping). See our full shop policy for details.


Description
 

With its dual single-coil pickups and smooth playing feel, the Player Jazz Bass® is an inspiring instrument that combines classic Fender® style with authentic bass tone and modern playability. Its powerful, punchy voice delivers the articulate growl and tight low-end response that has made the Jazz Bass® a staple across countless musical genres.

Built with an alder body and a comfortable maple neck featuring a Modern "C" profile, the Player Jazz Bass® offers a fast, smooth playing experience that's equally at home on stage, in the studio, or during long practice sessions. The 34" scale length, 9.5" radius maple fingerboard, and 20 medium jumbo frets provide a familiar feel that encourages expressive and confident playing.

A pair of Player Series Alnico 5 Single-Coil Jazz Bass® pickups delivers the iconic Fender® Jazz Bass® sound, offering exceptional clarity, dynamic response, and tonal flexibility. Independent volume controls for each pickup and a master tone control allow players to dial in everything from warm vintage tones to aggressive modern punch.

Item Shown: Player Jazz Bass®, Maple Fingerboard, Black
Model #: 0149902506
Case/Gig Bag: Sold Separately
Weight: 8.2 lbs

 
Product Specs
 

Body

  • Body Material: Alder
  • Body Finish: Gloss Polyester
  • Body Shape: Jazz Bass®
  • Color: Black

Neck

  • Neck Material: Maple
  • Neck Construction: 4-Bolt Standard
  • Neck Shape: Modern "C"
  • Neck Finish: Satin Urethane Finish on Back, Gloss Urethane Finish on Front
  • Fingerboard Material: Maple
  • Fingerboard Radius: 9.5" (241 mm)
  • Number of Frets: 20
  • Fret Size: Medium Jumbo
  • Nut Material: Synthetic Bone
  • Nut Width: 1.5" (38.1 mm)
  • Position Inlays: Black Dot
  • Scale Length: 34" (864 mm)
  • Truss Rods: Standard
  • Truss Rod Wrench: 3/16" Hex (Allen)

Electronics

  • Middle Pickup: Player Series Alnico 5 Single-Coil Jazz Bass®
  • Bridge Pickup: Player Series Alnico 5 Single-Coil Jazz Bass®
  • Pickup Configuration: SS
  • Controls: Volume 1 (Middle Pickup), Volume 2 (Bridge Pickup), Master Tone
  • Pickup Switching: None

Hardware

  • Bridge: 4-Saddle Standard
  • Hardware Finish: Nickel/Chrome
  • Pickguard: 3-Ply Parchment
  • Control Knobs: Vintage-Style Black Plastic Jazz Bass®
  • Tuning Machines: Standard Open-Gear

Miscellaneous

  • Series: Player
  • Strings: Fender® USA 7250M Nickel Plated Steel (.045-.105 Gauges), PN 0737250406

item.title: Nordstrand Audio Nordy NJ4 2011 - Sonic blue — $2,987.99
item.description:
$2,987.99 · Excellent · David's Gear Garage

Up for sale is a very rare boutique Jazz Bass – a Nordstrand Nordy VJ4, built in 2011 (Serial No. 271). I currently have two active Jazz Basses with 70's pickup spacing in my collection, so one of them unfortunately has to go.

Carey Nordstrand no longer builds complete instruments, making these custom-order Nordy basses highly sought after and hard to find.

The bass is in excellent condition and plays beautifully.

Specifications:

  • Model: Nordstrand Nordy VJ4 (70's style positioning)
  • Year of Production: 2011 (USA)
  • Body: Alder
  • Weight: 3.96 kg
  • Color: Specified as Sonic Blue, but in reality rather light greenish tint (see pic with seafoeam Lakland to have a reference), matching headstock
  • Neck: Maple with a comfortable, full D-profile that sits perfectly in the hand.
  • Fingerboard: East Indian Rosewood, 9"-14" compound radius, 20 thin frets, white binding, and white pearloid block inlays.
  • Nut Width: jazz 38.1 mm (Bone nut).
  • Pickups: Nordstrand NJ4 set in the 70's position
  • Electronics: Nordstrand 2B (2-band active preamp). Controls: Volume (push/pull for passive mode), Blend, Active Tone control (works in both active and passive modes), stacked Treble/Bass
  • Hardware: Lightweight US Hipshot tuners and US Hipshot vintage-style quick-release bridge.
  • Pickguard: 3-ply White Pearloid.
  • The bass comes with its original Gator gigbag, factory spec sheet.

The bass has an incredibly fat, punchy, and articulate sound with great mids. Extremely versatile and professionally set up with low action.

item.title: Fender American Ultra II Precision Bass Avalanche Maple Fingerboard — $2,299.99
item.description:
$2,299.99 · Brand New · Fuller's Guitar

- Fender Authorized Dealer - This item is Brand New with Full Factory Warranty.

- The photos shown are of the actual instrument being sold.

- Our luthiers at Fuller's Guitar thoroughly inspect and set up each instrument (to factory spec action and neck relief) prior to shipping to make sure that your new instrument is gig-ready right out of the box.

- Buy risk-free with our 14 day return policy (full refund, less shipping). Check out our shop policies for more details.

Item shown:
American Ultra II Precision Bass®, Maple Fingerboard, Avalanche
Model #:
0199102796
UPC #:
717669891206
Case/Gig Bag:
Deluxe Molded Case (Included)

Serial # US26007623
9lbs 5oz

Built for players boldly seeking the best, American Ultra II is our most advanced series of instruments. American Ultra II guitars and basses feature premium materials, precision craftsmanship and cutting-edge design for instruments that both advance the state-of-the-art and stand the test of time.

The Fender® American Ultra II Precision Bass® features a select alder body with sculpted body contours. For effortless playability, the quartersawn maple neck features our Modern D profile and smooth Ultra Satin finish. Ebony or quartersawn maple 10”-14” compound radius fingerboards feature Ultra rolled edges, medium-jumbo frets, Luminlay® side dots and Graph Tech® TUSQ® nuts. The tapered neck heel and sculpted body contours allow unparalleled access to the higher register, while the truss rod access at the headstock provides convenient and easy setup and adjustment.

Outfitted with a set of specially designed Ultra II Noiseless™ Vintage pickups, this bass delivers a massive tonal range, from vintage warmth to modern snap, all without a hint of hum. The redesigned preamp features unprecedented control to unlock endless tonal possibilities. Key features include S-1™ switching for active/passive operation, passive tone control and 3-band active EQ with switchable midrange frequency. Additional road-ready features including an adjustable HiMass™ top-load or string-through-body bridge, Fender light-weight tuners with tapered shafts, knurled aluminum knobs and 1-ply anodized aluminum pickguard.

The American Ultra II Precision Bass infuses iconic style with advanced appointments to take your playing to stratospheric new heights. For players who demand flawless tone, infinite versatility and limitless performance, American Ultra II delivers.

Features
Select Alder Body with Ultra Contours and Sculpted Neck Heel
Graphite Reinforced Quartersawn Maple Modern “D” Profile Neck with Posiflex™ Support Rods
10"-14" Compound Radius Ebony or Quartersawn Maple Fingerboard with Ultra Rolled Edges and Luminlay Side Dots
Ultra II Noiseless™ Vintage Precision Bass® Pickups and Vintage Jazz Bass® Pickups
Ultra II Active Bass Preamp With S-1™ Switching
4-Saddle Adjustable HiMass™ Bridge (String-Through-Body or Top-Load) and Deluxe Fluted-Shaft Tuners


General
SeriesAmerican Ultra II
OrientationRight-Hand
ColorAvalanche
Country Of OriginUS

Neck
HeadstockPrecision Bass®
Neck MaterialQuartersawn Maple
Neck FinishUltra Satin Urethane
Neck ShapeModern "D"
Neck Construction5-Bolt
Fingerboard Radius10" to 14" Compound Radius (254 mm to 355.6 mm)
Fingerboard MaterialQuartersawn Maple
Position InlaysBlack Pearloid Dot - 7 mm

BodySelect Alder

Hardware
Bridge4-Saddle Adjustable HiMass™ (String-Through-Body or Top-Load)
Bridge Mounting3-Screw Modern
Pickguard1-Ply Silver Anodized Aluminum
Pickup CoversBlack
Control KnobsHeavy Knurled Flat-Top
Hardware FinishNickel/Chrome
Tuning MachinesFender® "F" Light-Weight Vintage-Paddle Keys with Tapered Shafts
String TreesVintage-Style Disc
StringsFender® 7250M Nickel Plated Steel Roundwound, Long Scale, (.045-.105 Gauges), PN 0737250406

Strap ButtonsLocking

Electronics
Bridge PickupUltra II Noiseless™ Vintage Jazz Bass®
Middle PickupUltra II Noiseless™ Vintage Precision Bass®
Pickup ConfigurationSS
ControlsMaster Volume (with S-1™ Switch), Pan Pot (Pickup Selector), Stacked Concentric Midrange Boost/Cut + Passive Tone Control, Stacked Concentric Treble Boost/Cut + Bass Boost/Cut, Mini-Toggle Midrange Frequency Selector
SwitchingPan Pot
Special ElectronicsS-1™ Switch on Volume Selects Active Mode (Up Position) or Passive Mode (Down Position); 2-Way Mini-Toggle Midrange Frequency Selector (325 Hz or 750 Hz)

Measurements
Dimensions6.00x18.40x52.50 IN
Shipping Weight22.70 LB
Fret SizeMedium Jumbo
Scale Length34" (86.36 cm)
Shipping Length52.50 IN
Shipping Height6.00 IN
Shipping Width18.40 IN

Saddle Height Wrench.050" Hex (Allen) Wrench
Truss Rod Wrench1/8" Hex (Allen)

Miscellaneous

item.title: Jazz Bass - Fender Flea Artist Series Road Worn Signature — $1,150
item.description:
$1,150 · Excellent · james 's Gear Garage

This one is from 2016.Only signs of light used outside the factory relic.  Comes with a gig bag.  I love it but I’m just playing a different type of bass these days.  Let me know if you have questions.

Ships to the continental U.S. east of the Rockies for the for the shipping price listed. Ships UPS with reverb safe shipping option and lost or damaged items will be dealt with by the shipper, UPS, and Reverb.  If you do live in a very remote area let me know as I would ask you to pay the actual shipping cost. Please ask questions or come by and try it out as I do not offer returns. thanks.

  • Number of Strings:4
  • Left-/Right-handed:Right-handed
  • Body Shape:Jazz
  • Body Material:Alder
  • Color:Shell Pink
  • Body Finish:Roadworn Nitrocellulose Lacquer
  • Neck Material:Maple
  • Neck Shape:C profile
  • Radius:7.25"
  • Fingerboard Material:Rosewood
  • Number of Frets:20
  • Scale Length:34"
  • Nut Width:1.5"
  • Nut Material:Synthetic bone
  • Bridge/Tailpiece:Vintage-style, threaded steel "barrel" saddles
  • Neck Pickup:'64 J Bass Single-coil
  • Bridge Pickup:'64 J Bass Single-coil

Controls:Stacked Volume/Tone neck control, stacked Volume/Tone bridge control

item.title: Oscar Schmidt OSB-400C-TS-A Electric Bass - Tobacco Sunburst (OSB-400C-TS-A-U) — $399
item.description:
$399 · Brand New · Musician Madness

This traditional P-style bass guitar features a solid maple neck, rosewood fingerboard with medium-jumbo frets, split humbucking pick-up, 1-Volume & 1-Tone knob and chrome open gear machines. The most recorded electric bass design in rock n' roll history. You will know why as soon as you play one! Absolutely perfect for beginners or seasoned professionals alike.

item.title: Oscar Schmidt OB25B-A 3/4 Size Bass Guitar - Black (OB25B-A-U) — $399
item.description:
$399 · Brand New · Musician Madness

The OB25 is the perfect entry level bass for younger students with smaller hands allowing them to experience the joy of playing bass without the diifficulty a larger scale bass would present to small hands.

item.description:
$399 · Brand New · Musician Madness

This traditional P-style bass guitar features a solid maple neck, rosewood fingerboard with medium-jumbo frets, split humbucking pick-up, 1-Volume & 1-Tone knob and chrome open gear machines. The most recorded electric bass design in rock n' roll history. You will know why as soon as you play one! Absolutely perfect for beginners or seasoned professionals alike.

item.title: Fender Player II Jazz Bass Rosewood Fingerboard - Aquatone Blue — $849.99
item.description:
$849.99 · Brand New · Musician Madness

THIS ITEM WILL SHIP IN 7-10 DAYS

Step into the spotlight and experience iconic Fender® sound and style with the Player II Jazz Bass® a stage-ready bass guitar with contemporary updates to power your performance and inspire your playing.

The Player II Jazz Bass radiates timeless Fender charm, but under the hood, it's primed for today's players. Everything about the neck is designed for fast and fluid playability, from the Modern C-profile with silky satin urethane finish on the back to the comfy 9.5-radius slab rosewood or maple fingerboard with smooth rolled edges and 20 medium jumbo frets. A classic alder body is available in both timeless Fender finishes and never-before-seen colors unearthed from the archives. Player Series Alnico V Single-Coil J bass® pickups offer sweet highs, growling mids and seismic lows that elevate any genre. An adjustable 4-saddle bridge, single-groove steel saddles and open-gear tuners ensure precise tuning stability for the flexibility to explore endless sonic possibilities.

Perfect for crafting your own sound, the Player II Jazz Bass has the looks, tone and feel that only a Fender delivers.

item.title: Squier Classic Vibe Bass VI - Black — $569.99
item.description:
$569.99 · Brand New · Melhart Music Center

Six Strings of Sonic Possibility: The Squier Classic Vibe Bass VI

The Squier Classic Vibe Bass VI descends from the historic Fender Bass VI (1961–1975) that was embraced by guitar and bass luminaries alike. Jack Bruce played one in the early days of Cream. George Harrison used one in the Beatles' "Hey Jude" video. The Squier Classic Vibe Bass VI puts classic Fender bass tone, looks, and feel into your hands. It features a lightweight, resonant poplar body cut in that unmistakable, vintage Jaguar body shape that not only looks great but lays comfortably against your body for hours of comfortable playing. In addition, a unique trio of single-coil pickups on the Squier Classic Vibe Bass VI puts out an array of rich, full low-end tone as well as clear midrange and touches of treble. And a classic maple neck with C-shaped profile brings you that legendary Fender playability and comfort.

Squier Classic Vibe Bass VI Features:

  • Poplar body features comfort-focused contouring and a gloss polyurethane finish, blending style and substance
  • Maple neck marries full-spectrum warmth with note-separating articulation for vibrant voicing and powerful performances
  • Indian Laurel fingerboard enshrines your sound in a crystalline veneer that exudes presence without sounding muddy
  • C-shaped neck profile deftly accommodates players of numerous styles with comfort, control, and precision
  • 30-in. scale length and 9.5-in. fretboard radius ensure unfettered access to all 21 narrow tall frets
  • 3 Fender-designed alnico single-coil pickups and per-pickup on-off switches give you a palette of onboard sound-shaping opportunities
  • 2-position for Bass-cut "Strangle" circuit allows for pointed low-end refinement to suit your studio and stage playing
  • Bass VI bridge includes classic vibrato capabilities to conjure all manners of wave-warping expression
  • 1.685-in. bone nut keeps your sounds buzz-free
  • Vintage-style tuning machines give you sonic stability and stage-worthy panache

Tech Specs

  • Number of Strings: 6
  • Left-/Right-handed: Right-handed
  • Body Shape: Bass VI
  • Body Material: Poplar
  • Color: Black
  • Body Finish: Gloss Polyurethane
  • Neck Material: Maple
  • Neck Shape: C
  • Neck Joint: Bolt-on
  • Radius: 9.5"
  • Fingerboard Material: Indian Laurel
  • Fingerboard Inlay: White Pearloid Block
  • Number of Frets: 21, Narrow Tall
  • Scale Length: 30"
  • Nut Width: 1.685"
  • Nut Material: Bone
  • Bridge/Tailpiece: Bass VI Vintage-style Tremolo
  • Tuners: Vintage Style
  • Neck Pickup: Fender Alnico Single-coil
  • Middle Pickup: Fender Alnico Single-coil
  • Bridge Pickup: Fender Alnico Single-coil
  • Controls: 1 x master volume, 1 x master tone; 3 x on/off slide switches, 1 x bass-cut strangle circuit switch
  • Strings: Fender NPS, .024-.084
  • Case/Gig Bag: Sold Separately
  • Manufacturer Part Number: 0374580506

item.title: Schecter C-4 GT 4- string Active Bass- 2021- Natural Satin -8lbs 9oz — $599
item.description:
$599 · Excellent · Murphy's Music

Here we have a pre owned Schecter C-4 GT 4- string Active Electric Bass.  Made in Indonesia in 2021.  Natural Satin finish.  The C-4 GT is a set neck, 34" scale length bass.  It has a solid Mahogany body/Flame Maple Top with a Maple neck and 24- fret Ebony fingerboard with numeral inlays.  It is loaded with EMG soapbar pickups and an EMG 2- band active EQ.  Narrow 1.5" nut width like a Jazz bass and a flat 16" radius.   Super easy playing bass.  This one weighs 8lbs 9oz.   
This bass has just been setup with 45-100's and plays amazing!  The neck is nice and straight and the truss rod is working perfectly.  The frets are in excellent shape with no signs of play wear.  This bass plays cleanly up and down the fingerboard with no issues.  
Cosmetically, this bass is in excellent condition.  There are very very light marks but they are hard to find. This bass is in very very clean shape.  
Schecter makes some of the best instruments for the money.  This one is loaded with features typically found on far more expensive basses.  It's a blast to play too.   Add this one to your arsenal today.  Thanks for looking and happy buying!

From Schecter site...

                           We ship via Fedex ground, UPS, or USPS and insurance is always included in shipping.  

 Payments must be made within 48 hours of Sale/Auction's end.

Feel free to send a message if you have any questions. We are a full service music store in Melville, Long Island, NY. Hours- Mon-Thursday 11am-8pm Friday + Saturday 11am-6pm

                                           GOOD LUCK AND HAPPY BUYING!!!
